title: Estonia Income Tax Return of a Resident Natural Person (Vorm A / Form A)
description: Vorm A, 'Residendist füüsilise isiku tuludeklaratsioon' (Income Tax Return of a Resident Natural Person), the annual personal income tax return a resident natural person files with the Estonian Tax and Customs Board (Maksu- ja Tolliamet, EMTA) for income received during the preceding calendar year, due by 30 April of the following year (e-filing opens 15 February). The form and its own numbered sections/lines (rather than named AcroForm fields — see VERIFICATION.md) are established by the Minister of Finance's regulation 'Residendist füüsilise isiku tulu deklareerimine' (adopted under Tulumaksuseadus (Income Tax Act) §22(6), §23(4), §37(7), §44(7), and Sotsiaalmaksuseadus (Social Tax Act) §9(7)); the current consolidated text, in force from 16.02.2025, sets Vorm A as its Lisa 1 (Annex 1). This document models only the common case of a resident wage-earning individual filing alone (not jointly, and not as a European Economic Area resident invoking the cross-border provisions of §2): the taxpayer's own identification data (§1/§1.1), a single address-of-residence field as the form itself presents it (§3), contact details (§4), the domestic Part I wages/salary table for income already taxed at source (§5.1 Part I), gifts and donations made (§9.4), paid training expenses (§9.6), refund of an overpayment to an Estonian bank account (§11), and the closing signature declaration (§14/§14.1). It deliberately does NOT model: §2 (the EEA cross-border-resident provisions); §5.2-§5.5 (pension/PEPP, unit-linked life insurance, rental/royalty, and partnership/pool-of-assets income); §6 (gains from the transfer of property — the form's largest and most arithmetic-heavy section, including financial-asset transfers, forestry, other property, holding reductions, investment accounts, and company-merger income); §7 (income counted only for the basic-exemption calculation); §8 (all foreign-state income, §8.1-§8.9); §9.1-§9.3 (mandatory/supplementary pension contributions and foreign social security payments/contributions — chiefly payer-reported or pre-filled data, not primary manual taxpayer input); §10/§10.1-§10.3 (transfer of an unused training-expense deduction to a spouse or registered partner, which requires joint-filing context); §12 (refund to a foreign bank account); §13 (elections to leave an overpayment against future tax liabilities); and §14.2 (the representative-filed variant of the closing section). See VERIFICATION.md for the full scope rationale, every disclosed judgment call, and the candidate-screening record. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Estonia or the Estonian Tax and Customs Board.

authority.name: Maksu- ja Tolliamet (Estonian Tax and Customs Board)

operatedBy.name: Rahandusministeerium (Ministry of Finance)
operatedBy.basis: Rahandusministri 14.06.2011 määrus nr 30 'Residendist füüsilise isiku tulu deklareerimine' (RT I, 16.06.2011, 13; consolidated text RT I, 13.02.2025, 7, in force from 16.02.2025), kehtestatud tulumaksuseaduse § 22 lõike 6, § 23 lõike 4, § 37 lõike 7 ja § 44 lõike 7 ning sotsiaalmaksuseaduse § 9 lõike 7 alusel — §1 punkt 1 kehtestab vormi A 'Residendist füüsilise isiku tuludeklaratsioon' (Lisa 1). The return itself is filed with, and processed by, the Estonian Tax and Customs Board (Maksu- ja Tolliamet).

source.documentRef: Vorm A / Form A, 'Residendist füüsilise isiku tuludeklaratsioon / Income Tax Return of a Resident Natural Person', tax year 2025 edition — a genuine, current, directly downloadable, unauthenticated, bilingual (Estonian/English) 12-page PDF hosted on emta.ee, with no login/CAPTCHA/WAF gate. Confirmed via pdfjs-dist to carry zero AcroForm fields (no /T or /FT entries in any inflated stream) — a static print/hand-fill template, not a fillable PDF — but fully self-documenting via its own printed section/line numbers (1-14, with sub-items) and inline bilingual labels. Cross-referenced against the governing Minister of Finance regulation 'Residendist füüsilise isiku tulu deklareerimine' (Riigi Teataja, consolidated text RT I, 13.02.2025, 7, in force from 16.02.2025), retrieved via the Wayback Machine (snapshot 2025-11-01 of https://www.riigiteataja.ee/akt/113022025007) since riigiteataja.ee is a client-rendered Angular SPA that returns an empty shell to direct automated retrieval — this registry's established workaround for the same host (see ee/rik/private-limited-company-foundation, GOV-1705; ee/ppa/passport-application, GOV-1712).

verification.notes: GOV-1721: GovSchema Standard Research cycle, closing Estonia's Taxes vertical (4th of 6 EE verticals, alongside ee/ppa/e-residency-application GOV-1698, ee/ppa/passport-application GOV-1712, and ee/rik/private-limited-company-foundation GOV-1705). Vorm A is a genuine, current (tax year 2025), directly downloadable, unauthenticated PDF on emta.ee with no AcroForm layer (confirmed via pdfjs-dist: zero /T or /FT entries after inflating streams — a static print/hand-fill template, the same shape as pl/mf/zeznanie-pit-37) but fully self-documenting via its own printed numbered sections/lines and bilingual inline labels, extracted in full across all 12 pages with pdfjs-dist's getTextContent. Scoped to the single most common filer profile — a resident wage-earner filing alone with domestic-only income already taxed at source — deliberately excluding the form's far larger and more arithmetic-heavy capital-gains (§6) and foreign-income (§8) sections, mirroring this registry's precedent for pl/mf/zeznanie-pit-37's own single-filer, wage/pension-only scope. EE's remaining open verticals (DMV, Visa) were not screened this cycle; Visa remains this registry's standing lowest-priority EE candidate, flagged in prior cycles as a likely duplicate of the EU/Schengen long-stay-visa template already modelled for other jurisdictions. See VERIFICATION.md for the full field inventory, every disclosed scope exclusion and judgment call, and the statutory citation for the form's own governing regulation.

fields.name: firstName
fields.label: 1.1 Eesnimi / First name
fields.description: The taxpayer's first (given) name.

fields.name: surname
fields.label: 1.1 Perekonnanimi / Surname
fields.description: The taxpayer's surname.

fields.name: personalIdCode
fields.label: 1.1 Eesti isikukood / Estonian personal ID code
fields.description: The taxpayer's Estonian personal identification code (isikukood), an 11-digit number. This document is scoped to a resident taxpayer filing under §1/§1.1; the parallel provisions in §2 for an EEA resident without an Estonian personal ID code (who instead supplies a foreign identification number or an EMTA-issued registry code) are out of scope — see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: addressOfResidence
fields.label: 3. Elukoha aadress / Address of residence
fields.description: Address of the taxpayer's permanent or main place of residence at the time of submission of the tax return. The form prints this as a single address field, not a structured street/city/postal-code breakdown; modelled here the same way.

fields.name: telephone
fields.label: 4. Telefon / Telephone
fields.description: Optional telephone number to help the Tax and Customs Board reach the taxpayer about this return.

fields.name: mobilePhone
fields.label: 4. Mobiiltelefon / Mobile phone
fields.description: Optional mobile phone number to help the Tax and Customs Board reach the taxpayer about this return.

fields.name: contactEmail
fields.label: 4. e-post / e-mail
fields.description: Optional e-mail address to help the Tax and Customs Board reach the taxpayer about this return.

fields.name: wagePayerName
fields.label: 5.1 Part I — Väljamakse tegija, nimi / Payer, name
fields.description: Name of the payer (employer or other payer) of wages, salary, or other domestic income on which income tax has already been withheld.

fields.name: wagePayerRegistryOrPersonalIdCode
fields.label: 5.1 Part I — Väljamakse tegija, registri- või isikukood / Payer, registry code or personal ID code
fields.description: Registry code (if the payer is a legal person) or personal ID code (if the payer is a natural person) of the payer of the wage/salary income declared in this row.

fields.name: wageIncomeType
fields.label: 5.1 Part I — Tulu liik / Income type
fields.description: The type of domestic wage/salary or other income this row declares, on which income tax has already been withheld by the payer.

fields.name: wageIncomeAmount
fields.label: 5.1 Part I — Tulu summa / Income amount
fields.description: The amount of domestic wage/salary or other income declared in this row, in euros.

fields.name: wageWithheldIncomeTax
fields.label: 5.1 Part I — Kinnipeetud tulumaks / Withheld income tax
fields.description: The amount of income tax the payer already withheld from the income declared in this row, in euros.

fields.name: giftRecipientName
fields.label: 9.4 — nimi / name
fields.description: Name of the recipient of a gift or donation the taxpayer made during the tax period.

fields.name: giftRecipientRegistryOrPersonalIdCode
fields.label: 9.4 — registrikood / registry code
fields.description: Registry code of the recipient of the gift or donation (in practice, an entity on the Tax and Customs Board's public-benefit-organization list); the form's own printed label only names a registry code, but this schema follows this form's own dual registry-code/personal-ID-code pattern used elsewhere for a payer/recipient that may be a natural person, for consistency — see VERIFICATION.md judgment calls.

fields.name: giftRecipientCountry
fields.label: 9.4 — asukohariik / country of location
fields.description: Country where the gift/donation recipient is located.

fields.name: giftOrDonationAmount
fields.label: 9.4 — Tehtud kingituse ja annetuse summa / Amount of gift or donation made
fields.description: The amount of the gift or donation made, in euros.

fields.name: traineePersonalIdCode
fields.label: 9.6 — Koolitatava isikukood / Trainee's personal ID code
fields.description: Estonian personal identification code (isikukood) of the person whose training expenses were paid (the taxpayer or a family member).

fields.name: traineeFullName
fields.label: 9.6 — Koolitatava ees- ja perekonnanimi / Trainee's first name and surname
fields.description: Full name (first name and surname) of the person whose training expenses were paid, as the form's own combined column presents it.

fields.name: trainingInstitutionNameOrRegistryCode
fields.label: 9.6 — Õppeasutuse nimi, registreerimisnumber või registrikood / Educational institution's name, registration number or registry code
fields.description: Name, registration number, or registry code of the educational institution the paid training expenses were for, as the form's own combined column presents it.

fields.name: trainingInstitutionCountry
fields.label: 9.6 — Õppeasutuse asukohariik / Educational institution's country of location
fields.description: Country where the educational institution is located.

fields.name: trainingExpensesPaidAmount
fields.label: 9.6 — Tasutud summa / Paid amount
fields.description: The amount of training expenses paid, in euros.

fields.name: refundAccountNumber
fields.label: 11.1 Konto number / Account number
fields.description: Number (IBAN) of the Estonian bank account an overpayment of tax should be refunded to. Out of scope: §12, the parallel section for a refund to a foreign bank account.

fields.name: refundAccountOwnerFullName
fields.label: 11.2 Konto omaniku ees- ja perekonnanimi / Account owner's first name and surname
fields.description: First name and surname of the owner of the Estonian bank account nominated for the refund.

fields.name: refundAccountOwnerPersonalIdCode
fields.label: 11.2 Konto omaniku isikukood / Account owner's personal ID code
fields.description: Estonian personal identification code (isikukood) of the owner of the bank account nominated for the refund.

documents.label: Taxpayer's closing signature declaration and date
documents.statement: Kinnitan, et kui rendi- ja üüritulu ei ole tabelis 5.4 ja/või 8.7¹ deklareeritud, ei ole ma maksustamisperioodil rendi- ja üüritulu saanud. Kinnitan, et minule teadaolevalt on eespool esitatud andmed õiged. Olen teadlik, et ebaõige või ebatäpse teabe esitamine on maksukorralduse seaduse alusel karistatav. / I confirm that unless rental income is declared in table 5.4 and/or 8.7¹, I have not earned rental income in the tax period. I confirm that to the best of my knowledge the information provided above is correct. I am aware that the submission of incorrect or inaccurate information is punishable under the Taxation Act.
documents.sourceRef: Vorm A 2025, p.12/12, §14, §14.1 (taxpayer's own signature and date; the representative-filed variant at §14.2 is out of scope)
